name: Vault Minerals Limited
description: Vault Minerals Limited is an intermediate gold producer engaged in the exploration, mine development, and operation of gold and gold-copper assets. Headquartered in Australia, the company operates significant mining projects, including the Leonora Operations. Formerly known as Red 5 Limited, the company focuses on the extraction and sale of gold and gold-copper concentrates. Vault Minerals has established itself as a mid-tier producer with operations spanning Australia and Canada, demonstrating significant growth in revenue and operational capacity within the precious metals sector.
